Description: A unique numerical identifier assigned to each record in the dataset.
The specific date on which the holiday occurs. Currently stored as an 8-digit integer/string without separators.
The official name of the public holiday or observance.
A brief description explaining the origin, meaning, or significance of the holiday.
A web link pointing to an official government or informational page for further details about the holiday.
The specific state, territory, or region where the holiday is legally recognized (e.g., Australian Capital Territory).
